a3d7e9af1.title: New Server Hopes to Break Through AI’s “Memory Wall”
a3d7e9af1.body:
Memory is arguably the most serious constraint on modern AI large language models (LLMs). According to one influential paper , LLM token generation is an inherently memory-bound task, meaning the rate at which models output text is limited by how quickly data can be read in from memory. ae72b6e52.title: Finding Success in Industry as a Chip Designer
ae72b6e52.body:
I have been an application-specific IC (ASIC) designer for almost three decades. Over that time, I’ve moved through the full academic trajectory, from graduate student to full professor; later, I transitioned to industry after an unsuccessful stint at entrepreneurship.
